mapper.insert: INSERT INTO travel_trips (user_id, title, destination, start_date, end_date, travelers, budget_per_person, travel_style, currency, exchange_rate, status, info_content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{destination}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{travelers}, #{budgetPerPerson}, #{travelStyle}, #{currency}, #{exchangeRate}, #{status}, #{infoContent})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM travel_trips WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM travel_trips WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO travel_itinerary (trip_id, day_number, date, time_start, time_end, activity, category, cost, memo, display_order) VALUES (#{tripId}, #{dayNumber}, #{date}, #{timeStart}, #{timeEnd}, #{activity}, #{category}, #{cost}, #{memo}, #{displayOrder})

INSERT INTO travel_itinerary (trip_id, day_number, date, time_start, time_end, activity, category, cost, memo, display_order) VALUES
(#{i.tripId}, #{i.dayNumber}, #{i.date}, #{i.timeStart}, #{i.timeEnd}, #{i.activity}, #{i.category}, #{i.cost}, #{i.memo}, #{i.displayOrder})
INSERT INTO travel_checklist (trip_id, category, item, status, display_order) VALUES (#{tripId}, #{category}, #{item}, #{status}, #{displayOrder})

INSERT INTO travel_checklist (trip_id, category, item, status, display_order) VALUES
(#{c.tripId}, #{c.category}, #{c.item}, #{c.status}, #{c.displayOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE travel_checklist SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO travel_expenses (trip_id, expense_date, item, category, payment_method, amount, amount_krw, amount_per_person, amount_krw_per_person, memo, settled) VALUES (#{tripId}, #{expenseDate}, #{item}, #{category}, #{paymentMethod}, #{amount}, #{amountKrw}, #{amountPerPerson}, #{amountKrwPerPerson}, #{memo}, #{settled})
